title: T-022 — UI: MWO Detail page (7-tab + state stepper) + Task Checkoff + Complete Signoff + Downtime Linkage (MNT-021, MNT-M-04/M-12/M-13)
prompt:
# T-022 — MWO Detail technician workspace

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-021, §10.4 MNT-M-04/M-12/M-13, §11 V-MNT guards
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:437-503
Prototypes: work-orders.jsx:261-564 (mwo_detail_page); modals.jsx:236-355 (task_checkoff_modal, mwo_complete_signoff_modal); modals.jsx:846-879 (downtime_linkage_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/mwos/[id]` with state-machine stepper header + 7 tabs (Overview/Tasks/Parts/Labor/Downtime/Sign-off/History). Tab content state-gated. Modals for step check-off (measure/photo/signoff variants), complete sign-off with pre-condition gates, and downtime event linkage.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/page.tsx` — RSC parallel queries for MWO + checklists + parts + labor + downtime link + signoffs + history; pre-condition `allOk` computed server-side.
2. State stepper: shadcn Steps (shared T-019/T-020) reading current state from MWO row; state-transition primary button driven by mwo_state_machine_v1 allowed_to (uses T-010 Server Actions).
3. Conditional banners: LOTO required (amber, V-MNT-07 gate), Allergen sanitation (red, V-MNT-15..17), Calibration FAIL (red, V-MNT-10) — links to relevant tabs/modals.
4. Tasks tab: list of mwo_checklists; "Complete" opens task_checkoff_modal — step.type variants (check, measure with unit Select + pass/fail auto, photo with capture=environment S3 upload, signoff with PIN re-verify via Wave1 T-124 e-sign).
5. Parts tab: planned (mwo_spare_parts) + unplanned add via spare picker; Consume row action calls `consumeSparePart` Server Action (T-011) with row lock.
6. Labor tab: labor entries time + computed cost (manager-only hourly_rate column server-side).
7. Downtime tab: read-only join from 08-production downtime_events; "Link" button opens downtime_linkage_modal (calls T-017 linkMwoToDowntimeEvent).
8. Sign-off tab: multi-role rows (technician auto-applied, supervisor, safety officer) — each Sign button calls request_signoff Server Action.
9. Complete signoff modal: 3-button footer (Cancel/Save-draft/Confirm) — pre-condition checks block Confirm until allOk=true (server-side prop); calls completeMwo (T-010) emitting mwo.completed.
10. RBAC: technician scope hides manager-only labor cost column; only assigned technician can mark checklist steps done.
11. Empty/loading/error/permission states.

## Prototype parity
- 7-tab layout + state stepper — RTL snapshot of work-orders.jsx:261-564.
- Conditional banners (LOTO/Allergen/Cal FAIL) — interaction test.
- Task checkoff variants check/measure/photo/signoff — snapshot of modals.jsx:236-294.
- Complete signoff allOk gate + multi-role strip — snapshot of modals.jsx:296-355.
- Downtime linkage radio-select table — snapshot of modals.jsx:846-879.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/_components/mwo-detail-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/_components/task-checkoff-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/_components/mwo-complete-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/_components/downtime-linkage-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/_components/__tests__/mwo-detail.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]/_components/__tests__/modals.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /maintenance/mwos/[id] renders for state='in_progress', when compared to work-orders.jsx:261-564, then state stepper + 7 tabs (state-driven editable) + conditional banners match by RTL parity checklist.
2. Given equipment.requires_loto=true and loto.verified_at IS NULL, when MWO Detail renders, then LOTO required banner is shown and the "Start work" primary button is disabled with tooltip referencing V-MNT-07.
3. Given task_checkoff with step.type='photo' submitted, when settled, then S3 upload via presigned URL Server Action succeeds and URL persisted to mwo_task_photos.
4. Given mwo_complete_modal opened with checklist incomplete, when allOk computed server-side, then Confirm button is disabled and the pre-condition card lists the failing items.
5. Given consume Parts action triggers SPARE_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK (T-011 V-MNT-19), when settled, then row shows inline error chip and no stock decrement occurs.
6. Given downtime_linkage submitted, when settled, then mwo.downtime_event_id is set and outbox mwo.downtime_linked emitted (T-017).
7. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots for the 7 tabs + 3 modals attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity tests + Playwright e2e for state transitions + modal flows.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/[id]`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not derive allOk client-side from stale state — server-side prop only.
- Do not allow checklist completion outside state='in_progress'.
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side (technician can only complete assigned MWO; manager hourly_rate column server-filtered).
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.

pipeline_inputs.description: MWO Detail with 7 tabs + state stepper + conditional banners + 3 modals (task_checkoff, complete_signoff, downtime_linkage); largest MWO surface.
pipeline_inputs.details:
PRD anchor corrected from §11.1-11.4 to §11 by Fixer F12 2026-05-14 (anchor sweep; §11.1-11.4 is a range notation — using §11 parent Validation Rules section which covers V-MNT-01..24). Pre-condition allOk computed server-side. Wave1 T-124 e-sign for signoff variants. Largest UI task — keep scope tight.

Line range corrected from 261-584 (file has 564 lines).
out_of_scope: Sanitation completion modal (T-022 references but full UI deferred to MWO context)
acceptance_criteria: Given /maintenance/mwos/[id] renders for state='in_progress', when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/maintenance/work-orders.jsx:261-564, then state stepper + 7 tabs (state-driven editable) + conditional banners (LOTO/Allergen/Cal FAIL) match by RTL parity checklist

Given equipment.requires_loto=true and loto.verified_at IS NULL, when MWO Detail renders, then LOTO banner shown and Start work button disabled (V-MNT-07); given task_checkoff step.type='photo' submitted, then S3 upload via presigned URL succeeds and URL persisted to mwo_task_photos

Given mwo_complete_modal opened with checklist incomplete (allOk=false server-side), then Confirm disabled and pre-condition card lists failing items; given Consume Parts triggers SPARE_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK, then inline error chip and no stock decrement (V-MNT-19)

Given downtime_linkage submitted, when settled, then mwo.downtime_event_id set and outbox mwo.downtime_linked emitted (T-112); given closeout, then Playwright trace + screenshots for 7 tabs + 3 modals attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md
test_strategy: RED: RTL parity tests + Playwright e2e for state transitions + modal flows
